properties.verseOrder: v1 v2 v3 v4 v3 v5 v3

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: Jesus said that if I thirst I should come to him No one else can satisfy I should come to him

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: Jesus said if I am weak I should come to him No one else can be my strength I should come to him

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: For the Lord is good and faithful He will keep us day and night We can always run to Jesus Jesus, strong and kind

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: Jesus said that if I fear I should come to him No one else can be my shield I should come to him

verse.name: v5
verse.lines: Jesus said if I am lost He will come to me And he showed me on that cross He will come to me
